title: Centre raises export duties on diesel, aviation turbine fuel
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Centre has raised export duties.
*   These increased duties apply to diesel.
*   Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) exports are also subject to the higher rates.

title: Orbicular’s Ozempic generic gets U.S. FDA tentative nod
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Orbicular has received a tentative nod from the U.S. FDA.
*   This approval is for their generic version of Ozempic.
*   The tentative nod signals a crucial step towards a potentially more affordable alternative to the popular diabetes and weight-loss medication.

title: Home Secretary appoints Durai Kumar as DVAC in-charge following Election Commission reshuffle
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Durai Kumar has been appointed as the DVAC in-charge.
*   This appointment was made by the Home Secretary.
*   The decision follows a recent reshuffle initiated by the Election Commission.

title: Tamil Nadu voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
content:
A voter from Tamil Nadu has been deleted from the electoral roll.
*   This deletion has prompted a reminder to the Supreme Court regarding a previous commitment it made.
*   The reminder specifically references the Court's promise to protect voters in instances of 'mass exclusion' from electoral rolls.
